advisory_reviewers.summary: Blocked acceptance while final artifacts were placeholders and reviewer findings were unreconciled. Final artifacts and reviewer dispositions are now populated.
Required explicit provider classification and populated final evidence. The contract records authorized GitHub PR usage and scans found no prohibited attribution credit.
Required reclassification, role separation, provider authorization, and accountable owner evidence. The contract was amended accordingly.
Required committed files, populated artifacts, matching JSON and changed-file evidence, and reviewer reconciliation. The Phase 09 artifacts now provide that evidence.
Recommended strict validator, JSON parse, PowerShell parser, Git Bash shell syntax, and whitespace checks. The checks passed.
Found no blocking performance risk and recommended recording durations. Durations are recorded in this JSON.
Required placeholder replacement and changelog-policy reconciliation. The contract was amended to include changelog and wiki changelog updates.

known_non_blocking_limitations: Local screen-capture access was declined; no visual artifact is required for this repository-only validation.
Evidence archive growth can increase full JSON parse duration linearly.
